updates.✨ AniList Integration Added!: You can now connect your AniList account to automatically track your watch progress.
updates.📱 Mobile Player Overhauled: Fixed portrait mode controls, improved tap-to-pause behavior, and adjusted the episode layout on mobile screens.
updates.🐛 Sub/Dub Sync Fix: Switching between Sub and Dub will now remember the exact episode you were watching.
